mapper.select: SELECT u.institution_id FROM student s LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{studentId}

SELECT s.*, u.institution_id AS institutionId, i.institution_name AS institutionName, g.name AS className FROM student s LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN institution i ON u.institution_id = i.id LEFT JOIN `group` g ON s.class_id = g.id
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND s.identity_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{identityId}, '%')
AND s.gender = #{gender}
AND s.college LIKE CONCAT('%', #{college}, '%')
AND s.class_id = #{classId}
ORDER BY s.add_datetime DESC

SELECT g.name AS className, s.name AS studentName, c.course_name AS courseName, t.textbook_name AS textbookName FROM student s LEFT JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id AND ucl.type = 1 LEFT JOIN `group` g ON ucl.class_id = g.id LEFT JOIN course_class_list ccl ON g.id = ccl.class_id LEFT JOIN course c ON ccl.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON c.id = ctl.course_id LEFT JOIN textbook t ON ctl.textbook_id = t.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND c.course_name IS NOT NULL AND t.textbook_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY g.name, c.course_name, t.textbook_name
